vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. There is no evidence of living plant tissue in any of the registered containers. The 'Systemic Loss' status is confirmed across all specimens.

vision_report.narrative_description: Upon meticulous audit of the provided image sequence, it is clear that the botanical collection has suffered a total systemic failure. None of the registered plants (P1-P4) are present in the containers. The pots contain only soil and, in the case of P3, a decorative anchor. There is no evidence of germination, regrowth, or surviving foliage. The environment is currently devoid of life.
